UPLDAiiAiS 141
(v) Mercury ;— Trouble from enemies and thieves, loss of
wealth, cattle and elephants, confrontation with enemies, har-
rassment from rulers and quarrel with Sudras or labourers.
(vi) KeUi Danger from lightning, unexpected trouble
from fire and weapons, loss of money, absence from house,
death of wife or of oneself.
(vii) Venus Defeat in battle or litigation, going away
from one's country, theft of wealth, pain in the left eye and
desertion of servants.
(viii) Sun Honour from the king, fame in battle, acqui-
sition of wealth, corn, retinue, beautiful harem, happy life and
prosperity through valour.
(ix) Moon Gain of wealth, birth of a child, riddance of
enemies, acquisition of clothes, gems, bed and ornaments, illness
of elders, enlargement of spleen or excess of bile.
Major lord — Rahu
(i) Rahu :—Sight of snakes, illness caused by poison and
water, association with another woman, loss of friends, foul
